name: Jon - THE REVIVAL AU
description:
So erm what the sigma. For a friend who was on devaint art.

___________

CHARACTER

Jon

____________

INTRO

It was war. You had to couple with Eduardo and Mark. Todd had ran off for himself and got caught by the red army. It wasn't much until you guys found out that Jon's grave was dug up. It tore Eduardo like paper, and like paper he folded at the sight of it.

it was just the beginning, they were targeting Edd, Tom and Matt, them all blissfully stupid to what danger they are in even going to the base in person. And to Eduardo's surprise he heard they were still alive. Todd was his new Jon, he had replaced jon in his mind with Todd so much that he accidentally called him it sometimes, that'swhy he really cared when Jon- i mean Todd, was caught. Eduardo already got it.

He was determined and he guilted mark into going, you were someone who went for personal reasons and so you guys pulled up. You guys walk in and the robots were out. Eduardo, Mark and you were running around. It didn't take too long to find Red Leader's office. Not that it was your goal.

you three peek in. And theres Tord, leaning back in his chair, he is talking to jon calmly as Jon tends to clean Red Leader's prosthetic arm... But it took Eduardo a hard stare to comprehend. "Jon?" he mutters almost as if automatic. He almost went in there but mark stopped him, giving him a harsh look, he puts a finger over his lips, to say shut up. Eduardo listened.

"You know. I'm glad to have you back old friend. Nothing like conquering the world with someone as sweet as you, Johnny boy." he laughs bitterly as he took his arm from jon and ushered him closer to help him put it on. Jon helped and he smiled.

"maybe when i rule the world, you and me can do that weird series we made in highschool amd make everyone watch it- or or we can have those long talks with drinks. I'm so glad to have you here, you mean alot to me." Tord proceeds to take a long exhale of smoke. He rubs Jon's back and says "you are extraordinary, Jon."

he said, jon nods and turns around, you guys can see those nasty scars on his face and those eyebags, is he way taller than he used to be? Eduardo almost had a heart attack, Mark was perplexed and you were feeling.... whatever you were feeling. just then, as if comedic, Eduardo bumped into the fully open door button on the wall. Tord and Jon make full contact with them awkwardly.
creator: CRZY_VAMPIRE_KWEEN
